plang_failures_note: 203 excludes the 4 intentional fail-fixtures (Tests/{TestModule,Modules/Test}/Report/_fixtures_fail + _fixtures_sensitive). The single 'Failed to deserialize List`1' stdout line is a negative-path mock test feeding bad JSON, not a failure. Unchanged from v4/v5 baseline.
scope: Re-review of coder v7 (8b42b0d31) — test-only change closing tester v5 F1. coder v7 added Scenario4_PersistedGrantReVerified_NonceReplayDoesNotReprompt verbatim from v5's handed-over spec.

mutation_verification.mutation: permission/this.cs:147 SkipFreshnessCheck true -> false, clean rebuild, run Scenario4*
mutation_verification.result: 2 tests fail independently — Scenario4_PersistedGrantSurvivesPast_WireFreshnessWindow (secondRead, step 2 wire-freshness) and Scenario4_PersistedGrantReVerified_NonceReplayDoesNotReprompt (read2, step 4 nonce-replay). Scenario4_RestartStillNoPrompt passes (one verify only).
mutation_verification.assessment: One mutation, two independent failures on different assertions. Each half of SkipFreshnessCheck is now its own regression gate — the F1 gap tester v5 identified is closed. Production code restored, suite re-confirmed green.

findings.title: Nonce-replay half of the F-A fix is ungated
findings.detail: Closed by coder v7. Added Scenario4_PersistedGrantReVerified_NonceReplayDoesNotReprompt — app1 creates a persisted grant, app2 reads the foreign file twice with a StatelessChannel; each Find re-deserializes Data so each read is a real VerifySignature pass. Mutation true->false now kills this test on read2 (step 4 nonce-replay) independently of the step-2 _WireFreshnessWindow test.
findings.fix: Done — test added verbatim from tester v5 spec.

non_blocking_notes.detail: ValidatePathTests.UpperCasedRootPrefix_..._OnUnix docstring still over-claims the RootComparison gate (carried from tester v4 N1).
auditor F-5: MoveCopyBundledConsentTests covers bundled consent only on the v2 Path surface; real copy.cs/move.cs handlers issue two prompts. Fairly deferred with auditor F-C/D/E.

verdict_note: coder v7 closes tester v5 F1 — the only finding — with the exact test handed over, mutation-verified. The F-A regression guard now covers the full mechanism (wire-freshness AND nonce-replay). Suites green: C# 2855/2855, PLang 203/203.
summary: Clean rebuild: C# 2855/2855 (+1 vs v5 = the new test), PLang 203/203, 0 fail, 0 skip. coder v7 added Scenario4_PersistedGrantReVerified_NonceReplayDoesNotReprompt verbatim from tester v5's spec. Mutation SkipFreshnessCheck true->false now produces two independent Scenario4 failures (step 2 wire-freshness, step 4 nonce-replay) — the F1 gap is closed, each half its own regression gate. Verdict: pass, no open findings.
